description: ADK layer registry (LEGACY). The chiplet boundary is no longer bound to a fabrication layer: it is carried by the per-assembly boundary manifest (config/schema/boundary_manifest.schema.json), outside any PDK namespace. The entries below are legacy-compat only, read by the assembly DRC's --legacy-exchange0 path for pre-migration GDS.

exchange0.purpose: Legacy fabrication-layer location of the chiplet boundary (IHP SG13G2 Exchange0, 190/0). Read only by layers_def.drc in --legacy-exchange0 compat mode. The default boundary source is the boundary manifest.
